title: ckrafter's Vanilla+
description: This is the modpack, shaders, and resourcepacks I recommend when playing on my server.
body:
I created this pack so that players on my private server have an easy way to make their experience better, even for those that wouldn't typically install any mods or resource packs. Anyone on my server that uses this pack can receive very quick and accurate help because I'm already familiar with the pack.

More specifically, this pack substantially improves Minecrafts performance and makes the game feel more lively. Please check out the [Vanilla Perfected pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) by [demonjoe](https://modrinth.com/user/demonjoeTV) as it contains almost everything that's in my pack. The folllowing video goes over Vanilla Perfected and even shows you how to install it or any other modpack: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pOLRDPdu5pA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pOLRDPdu5pA)

Based on [the Vanilla Perfected modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) by [demonjoe](https://modrinth.com/user/demonjoeTV).

I also added the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) configuration suggested by [demonjoe](https://modrinth.com/user/demonjoeTV). To be clear, [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) is a resource pack [made by several people in the community](https://vanillatweaks.net/about/) that tweaks the existing vanilla textures. I highly recommend creating your own tweaks on https://vanillatweaks.net
